MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
John Aubrey, appeared for Defendant/Moving party CCSF

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant's Motion For Order Establishing Admissions is granted. No opposition has been filed. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $481.95, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Off Calendar Jan-11-2006 Continued To May-04-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Albert Loeb Boasberg, Esq., for failure to appear at the Pre-Arbitration Settlement Conference on 11/7/2005 is ordered off calendar/good cause. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez.

PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2005 Continued To Jan-05-06 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY/RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY
Off Calendar Oct-26-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
Lesli B. Sjostrom, appeared for Deft. CCSF
No other appearance.
Ruling:
Hearing held. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $393.75, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
